name: Mmmm...apple Salad
recipeIngredient: 3 Granny Smith apples, peeled and cored
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the apples into small pieces.
2. Cube the Snickers bars.
3. Scoop out the cooled crushed pineapple from its can and drain any excess liquid.
4. Measure out half a cup of chopped peanuts.
5. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients together just before serving.
6. Enjoy your creation during the holiday season with family and friends, who will smile in delight at your wonderful dish.
